The '''Majan''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]]. The majority of Majans lived in [[Baroo/Legends|Baroo]], a large [[City/Legends|city]] that encircled the [[Nazwa]] ruins.<ref name="CSWE" /> The Majans looked very much like baseline [[Human/Legends|Humans]], only with a few, subtle differences such as having three lobes per [[Ear/Legends|ear]]. All Majans had tan skin, with dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and [[Eye/Legends|eye]] [[Color/Legends|color]].<ref name="OPG" />
